name: Davos 1917
overview: More determined than ever to live her life in accordance with her deepest desires, nurse Johanna Gabathuler finds herself embroiled in a spy conspiracy with international implications. There’s a high price to pay and it’s risky to say the least, but she will do anything it takes to find her daughter and, ultimately, secure her freedom.

trailers.title: DAVOS 1917 I Official Trailer OV (EN sub) I Season 1 (2023)
